sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100000" key="sunektiqhne/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-τῐθηνέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n100000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">assist in fostering</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.321d</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">662b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
